description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build NPM Packages that can be triggered manually with an optional Ice version input or called by another workflow with an optional ice_version input. The workflow should have two jobs: build-slice-compilers and pack-npm. The build-slice-compilers job runs on a matrix of OS environments, checks out the repository, sets up C++ and Node, builds the slice2js compiler, and uploads the compiler artifact. The pack-npm job runs on ubuntu-24.04, depends on build-slice-compilers, downloads the compiler artifacts, copies the slice2js binaries, builds JS, updates the version if provided, packs the npm package, and uploads the NPM packages.
